children.label: a
children.text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter, but not more than $13,895,000 for the acquisition of lands and interests in lands.
the facilities needed to accommodate the health, safety, and interpretive needs of the visiting public;
the location and estimated cost of all facilities; and
the projected need for any additional facilities within the park.
